displacementInvalidNumbersCount: Each line in file with displacement data should have 3 (dx, dy, dz) or 4 (index, dx, dy, dz) numbers.
displacementIsNotTheSameAsNodesCount: Displacement count ({{displacementCount}}) is not  the same as nodes count ({{nodesCount}}).
stressInvalidNumbersCount: Each line in file with stress data should have values for 6 stress components: index (optional), x, xy, zx, y, yz, z. If your file has only one value for an element, use option “Other characteristic”.
stressIsNotTheSameAsNodesCount: Stress count ({{stressCount}}) is not  the same as elements count ({{elementsCount}}).
